title: selliguea oblongifolia
intro: Selliguea oblongifolia, also known as Polypodium lunatum or Pilea, is a type of plant commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in Asia and the Americas, and belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Selliguea oblongifolia include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Selliguea oblongifolia can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
